results.title: Thailand woos heat-weary Europeans with travel and air-conditioners
results.description: BANGKOK: As soaring temperatures fuel demand for cooling in Europe, Thailand is pitching itself as a source of relief, promoting rainy-season holidays while exporting more air conditioners.

results.title: IC Electricals IPO allotment today: SME IPO subscribed 420x, GMP rises. Here's how to check status online
